reviews.review_description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Absolutely love this game!
Primal Tag is one of the most fun and intense VR experiences I've ever had. The movement feels smooth, the maps are super creative, and the player community is always active and chill. Whether you’re running, hiding, or chasing, every match feels exciting. I’ve met some great people and had nonstop laughs playing this game. Huge props to the devs—can’t wait to see what updates come next! If you haven’t tried it yet, you’re missing out!!
Great game and one of the first or if not the first to play great movement and gameplay. One of the best thanks to the owner and devs. Definitely 5 Stars
